units.content: storage holds typed-absence annotation for each target entity when no measurement record exists for a specific property
the typed-absence annotation takes one of at least four predetermined values distinguishing absences by their origin within a predetermined taxonomy
storage holds actionability tier annotation for each target entity taking one of a predetermined plurality of values
actionability tier annotation indicates the degree to which the target entity is available for action records referencing it
analyzers of claims 1, 22, 24, and 25 are configured to respect typed-absence annotations in their emissions
analyzers of claims 1, 22, 24, and 25 are configured to respect actionability-tier annotations in their emissions
analyzer emissions must honor both typed-absence and actionability-tier annotations as constraints on output
